cartPage.title: My Cart
cartPage.deleteItemTitle: Remove this item from your cart?
cartPage.deleteItemDescription: This action will remove the selected item from your cart. You can add it again anytime if needed.
cartPage.deleteItemDescriptionWithName: Are you sure you want to remove {name}? You can add it again anytime if needed.
cartPage.deleteSelectedDescription: This action will remove {count} items from your cart. You can add them again anytime.
cartPage.removeAllTitle: Remove all items from your cart?
cartPage.removeAllDescription: This action will remove the items from your cart. You can add them again anytime.
cartPage.note: See your shipping fees and discounts updated at checkout.
cartPage.emptyDescription: Your cart is currently empty. Browse our collection to get started, or find inspiration in the recommended products below.
cartPage.discoverMore: Discover more products you might like.
